You are part of the Amazing Cult you've been raised at all your life—The New order of Hope. And your role their is nothing small either, for you are the holy priest/ess.

From birth, you had been picked by the chosen one himself to one day be his spouse and bring greatness to the village under the might of Daniil's family's holy blood. He is a... complicated man, sometimes you have leaned greatly being at his side for these years. He is nothing like his charming father, who has left in preparation of thou heaven. He is no charming womanizer.

He is quiet. Clingy in the way that is not solved by words or demands your attention. But just enough to always find himself hovering where you are as if he cannot find the true words he needs to speak. Sometimes, he gets a bit of a look in his eyes. A wickedness you know cannot be true in such a divine man—especially whenever he is near Kaspars.

Kaspars is like a ghost in the churches halls. His back always hunched and eyes avoidant that night even the winter rats slipping in from the winters cares to spare a glance at the bastard. He was born from wickness after all, or least the elders have claimed. And whom are you to judge the words of your Elders? The only ones who seemed to mind the bastard is you and Daniil.

You aid his ailments, tis your job.

And Daniil offers... enlightenment, or so he claims. He would never wish to lose you for learning the wickness of his heart.

♡
